arts.sum: He's struggling at the London Stadium...

arts.ttl: West Ham 2-5 Arsenal: How Gunners triggered Newcastle flashbacks as Anthony Taylor decision slammed
arts.sum: Arsenal expert Charles Watts admits that he had flashbacks to the Gunners' 4-4 draw with Newcastle United during their 5-2 victory over West Ham United at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson favourite open to Ruud van Nistelrooy reunion at Leicester City
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson's former Manchester United assistant Rene Meulensteen has already admitted he would be happy to help Ruud van Nistelrooy should the new Leicester City boss contact him. Van Nistelrooy was appointed the Foxes' new manager last week after the previous boss, Steve Cooper, was sacked.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca reveals what he told Ruud van Nistelrooy about Leicester City as new era dawns
arts.sum: He also spoke of his friendship with former Foxes boss Maresca, who guided the club back into the Premier League at the first time of asking last season. Ruud van Nistelrooy revealed during his inaugural Leicester City conference on Monday that he spoke to Enzo Maresca before accepting the manager’s job at the King Power Stadium.

arts.ttl: ‘Not a top club or attractive challenge’ – Claim player simply didn’t fancy move to West Ham
arts.sum: West Ham were linked with a move for Scott McTominay in the summer transfer window. The Hammers’ move didn’t materialise, as the Scotland international joined Napoli for €30m and is already thriving in Italy. arts.sum: Leicester City’s Boubakary Soumaré was on loan at Sevilla last season, and they didn’t exercise their buying option, resulting in the player returning to the King Power in the summer. On October 19th, we covered claims from Spain which stated Soumaré has expressed his desire to leave Leicester in the winter market.
